title: Titan Series Blow Molded White Plastic Folding Chair with Gray Frame
features: Comfortable event seating has its champion.
This blow molded plastic folding chair features and oversized wide seat and backrest for unparalleled comfort.
The HDPE plastic is water-resistant and easy to clean, while the steel frame is built to withstand up to 500 lbs of weight capacity.
An integrated carrying handle helps to make quick work of event setups.
Below the seat, the curved, ergonomic frame crosspiece allows for extra foot room enhancing the guest's comfort.
These chairs look great with our plastic folding tables.
Don't forget about storage and transport as well, with a trolley made specifically for this blow molded plastic folding chair.

faq.question: Do you have a cart that can hold these chairs?
faq.answer: Yes, we have a cart specifically made for these chairs. Please take a look at the Blow Molded Folding Chair Cart.
